name: Zucchini Crust Pizza (Merrilyn Vaughan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Press liquid out of the grated zucchini and throw away the excess liquid.
3. Combine the grated zucchini, eggs, whole wheat flour, and salt in a bowl until well mixed.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on a well-greased baking sheet or pizza pan measuring 9 inches by 12 inches.
5. Bake until the crust is firm, about 15-20 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and reduce temperature to 350 degrees.
7. Spread pizza sauce over the crust and add favorite toppings.
8. Sprinkle with preferred cheese.
9. Return to oven and bake until the sauce is bubbly and the cheese is melted, approximately 10 to 15 minutes.
